title: PharmCorp
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''PharmCorp''' was a local company on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Nubia/Legends|Nubia]]. It was the largest corporation on the planet and specialized in producing a wide variety of agricultural and pharmaceutical products. The company was owned by [[Prall (Hutt)|Prall]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]], but in an effort to not hurt business, this fact was not revealed to the general Nubian public.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2003-01-XX -->''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''
